function.rulebook_notes: Per the inbox-processing workflow, ambiguous or missing-canonical-support requests must stop without mutating the workspace. The v2 update also says not to leave partial edits when the task is not fully doable.
function.outcome_justification: The inbox request in 00_inbox/724_next-task.md listed five records to OCR, but one requested item could not be found as specified. The process-next-inbox-item and inbox-processing-v2-update workflows require full completion with no partial edits; when a referenced item is missing, the correct result is clarification rather than partially processing the other four.
